name: workflow state contract validator rejects a state file missing the required session_id field
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*session_id' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
